entity.summary: Latin American centralized cryptocurrency exchange originally known as SurBTC and later operating under the Buda.com brand across Chile, Colombia, Peru, and Argentina. Current first-party and exchange-profile sources continue to present Buda as an operating exchange, so HEI classifies it as active.
entity.notes: The record uses Buda as the canonical current identity and preserves SurBTC as an alias. The 2015 date is a year-level origin marker; the exact launch day was not established in this batch.

events.title: Buda lineage began as SurBTC
events.description: The Latin American exchange lineage behind Buda began operating as SurBTC before later adopting the Buda.com brand.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker from company and exchange-profile material.

evidence.title: Buda official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website confirms the operating Buda exchange identity.

evidence.title: Buda exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange profile corroborates the Buda exchange identity and regional market presence.
